column.name: ClientDivision
column.description: Commercial division or sub-segment the client belongs to (e.g., a sales division/territory grouping). Often null or sparsely populated; use for rollups only when populated consistently.

column.name: Client_Id
column.description: Unique identifier for the client/account (e.g., distributor, super stockist) and a primary filter key for performance. Analysts typically join/group by this field to attribute all stock and value measures to a specific client.

column.name: Client_Name
column.description: Human-readable name of the client/outlet (e.g., "Rainbow Agencies"). Use for reporting labels; do not rely on it for joins because naming can vary or contain spelling/case differences.

column.name: Client_Type
column.description: Business classification of the client such as Distributor or Super Stockiest. Useful for channel-level analysis and comparisons across client roles.

column.name: ClosingImpactC1
column.description: Quantity impact adjustment applied to closing stock under the C1 bucket (often 0 in samples). Interpret as an adjustment quantity separate from normal movements, potentially representing audit/price/impact corrections tracked in C1.

column.name: ClosingImpactValueC1
column.description: Value impact adjustment applied to closing stock under the C1 bucket (often 0 in samples). Treat as the monetary counterpart to ClosingImpactC1 and keep separate from standard stock valuation.

column.name: Function
column.description: Client/function identifier used by the source system; in samples it mirrors Client_Id. Treat as a technical mapping field unless you confirm distinct business meaning in upstream documentation.

column.name: MRP
column.description: Maximum Retail Price for the SKU/variant at the time of the record (e.g., 40.0, 275.0). Use as a reference price; note it is float and may not match net value calculations used in the Value columns.

column.name: OpeningImpactC1
column.description: Quantity impact adjustment applied to opening stock under the C1 bucket (often 0). Use to explain differences between expected opening balance and reported opening quantities in C1 tracking.

column.name: OpeningImpactValueC1
column.description: Value impact adjustment applied to opening stock under the C1 bucket (often 0). Use alongside OpeningImpactC1 when reconciling opening valuation adjustments in C1.

column.name: PName
column.description: Composite product/variant display name typically combining product name and shade/variant (e.g., "Kajal Deluxe 1.75gm / Black-KL-07"). Useful for user-facing reports where the variant descriptor is needed.

column.name: ProDivision
column.description: Product/business division (e.g., Retail) representing how the product line is organized commercially. Use for division-level product performance rollups.

column.name: ProductDescription
column.description: Free-text description of the product; often null/blank in samples. Use cautiously as it may be inconsistently populated and better suited for search/display than analytics.

column.name: Product_Category
column.description: Merchandise category for the product (e.g., "Personal Nail Paint (5 ML)"). Use for category-level reporting and assortment analysis; categories are typically more stable than names/descriptions.

column.name: Product_Id
column.description: Unique identifier for the product (not necessarily the specific shade/variant) and an indexed filter key for performance. Commonly used to join to product masters and aggregate across variants of the same product.

column.name: Product_Name
column.description: Base product name without full variant detail (e.g., "Personal Nail Paint 5ml"). Use for higher-level product reporting; combine with variant fields for SKU-level granularity.

column.name: TotalAuditImpact
column.description: Net quantity adjustment due to audit activities (e.g., stock count corrections), typically 0 in samples. Use to reconcile book stock vs physical stock differences over the reporting period.

column.name: TotalAuditImpactValue
column.description: Monetary value associated with TotalAuditImpact. Use when quantifying the financial impact of audit adjustments separately from operational movements.

column.name: TotalClosing
column.description: Total closing stock quantity for the period for the client-product(-variant) combination; may be negative in the source (e.g., -144) indicating data/ledger anomalies or backdated transactions. Interpret as ending on-hand quantity per the reporting logic, and investigate negatives as exceptions.

column.name: TotalClosingC1
column.description: Closing stock quantity under the C1 bucket; in samples it equals TotalClosing. Use to analyze closing balances specifically under the C1 classification when it differs from overall totals.

column.name: TotalClosingImpact
column.description: Total quantity impact adjustments included in closing (often 0). Use to isolate closing balance corrections from standard movement-based closing stock.

column.name: TotalClosingImpactValue
column.description: Total value impact adjustments included in closing (often 0). Use to separate valuation corrections from normal closing stock value.

column.name: TotalClosingValue
column.description: Total closing stock value for the period; may be negative consistent with negative quantities (e.g., -4882). Interpret as ending inventory valuation per the system’s valuation method, not necessarily MRP-based.

column.name: TotalClosingValueC1
column.description: Closing stock value under the C1 bucket; in samples it equals TotalClosingValue. Use for C1-specific closing valuation analysis when applicable.

column.name: TotalDeletedSaleQty
column.description: Quantity of sales that were deleted/voided in the period (often 0). Use to audit sales reversals and to reconcile gross vs net sales movements.

column.name: TotalDeletedSaleValue
column.description: Value associated with deleted/voided sales (often 0). Use to quantify the financial effect of sales deletions separately from standard sales value.

column.name: TotalInterGodownTransfer
column.description: Quantity moved via inter-godown (warehouse-to-warehouse) transfers (often 0). Use to analyze internal logistics movements that do not represent external sales/purchases.

column.name: TotalInterGodownTransferValue
column.description: Value associated with inter-godown transfers (often 0). Use for inventory valuation movement reporting tied to internal transfers.

column.name: TotalOpening
column.description: Total opening stock quantity for the period; may be negative in the source (e.g., -84) reflecting historical corrections or timing issues. Interpret as beginning on-hand quantity used to compute period movements and closing.

column.name: TotalOpeningC1
column.description: Opening stock quantity under the C1 bucket; in samples it equals TotalOpening. Use to track opening balances within C1 classification where maintained separately.

column.name: TotalOpeningImpact
column.description: Total quantity impact adjustments included in opening (often 0). Use to explain discrepancies between prior closing and current opening due to adjustments.

column.name: TotalOpeningImpactValue
column.description: Total value impact adjustments included in opening (often 0). Use for valuation reconciliation of opening balances impacted by corrections.

column.name: TotalOpeningValue
column.description: Total opening stock value for the period; may be negative consistent with quantity. Use as the starting inventory valuation for period reconciliation analyses.

column.name: TotalOpeningValueC1
column.description: Opening stock value under the C1 bucket; in samples it equals TotalOpeningValue. Use for C1-specific opening valuation rollups.

column.name: TotalPurchaseReturn
column.description: Quantity returned to supplier (purchase returns) during the period (often 0). Use to analyze reverse supply movements that reduce inventory and offset purchases.

column.name: TotalPurchaseReturnValue
column.description: Value associated with purchase returns (often 0). Use to quantify the financial value of inventory returned to supplier.

column.name: TotalRecieved
column.description: Quantity received into inventory (purchases/inbound receipts) during the period (often 0). Use as the primary inbound movement measure affecting stock increases.

column.name: TotalRecievedValue
column.description: Value of received quantities during the period (often 0). Use for inbound inventory value flow and reconciliation against purchase value sources.

column.name: TotalReturnRecieved
column.description: Quantity received back as returns (e.g., customer returns received into stock) during the period (often 0). Use to analyze reverse sales flow increasing inventory.

column.name: TotalReturnRecievedValue
column.description: Value associated with return receipts (often 0). Use for financial quantification of stock coming back via returns.

column.name: TotalSaleQty
column.description: Quantity sold/issued out during the period (often 0 in samples). Use as the primary outbound movement measure; combine with opening/receipts/other movements to reconcile closing.

column.name: TotalSaleValue
column.description: Value associated with sales quantities (often 0 in samples). Interpret as sales value per the system’s valuation/pricing basis (may differ from MRP).

column.name: TotalStockIn
column.description: Total quantity of stock-in movements other than standard receipts/returns (often 0). Use for miscellaneous inbound adjustments (e.g., transfers-in or corrections) depending on the source definition.

column.name: TotalStockInValue
column.description: Value associated with TotalStockIn (often 0). Use to track the monetary effect of miscellaneous inbound stock movements.

column.name: TotalStockOut
column.description: Total quantity of stock-out movements other than standard sales (often 0). Use for miscellaneous outbound adjustments (e.g., wastage, write-offs, transfers-out) depending on upstream configuration.

column.name: TotalStockOutIn
column.description: Quantity of stock moved out but classified under a specific stock-out-in category (often 0), likely representing transfers out with expected inbound elsewhere. Use for tracking movement pipelines distinct from sales/consumption.

column.name: TotalStockOutInValue
column.description: Value associated with TotalStockOutIn (often 0). Use to quantify valuation tied to these stock-out-in movements.

column.name: TotalStockOutValue
column.description: Value associated with TotalStockOut (often 0). Use to measure the financial impact of non-sale outbound inventory movements.

column.name: TotalTarnsitQty
column.description: Quantity currently in transit (pipeline inventory) during/at period end (often 0; note misspelling in column name). Use to analyze inventory not yet available at destination but already dispatched.

column.name: TotalTarnsitValue
column.description: Value of inventory in transit (often 0). Use to report pipeline inventory valuation and reconcile with transfer/shipping processes.

column.name: VSKU_Code
column.description: Variant/SKU code used operationally (e.g., numeric codes or alphanumeric like "BHC0943"). Use as a business-facing SKU identifier for integrations and reporting; may be more stable than names.

column.name: Variant_Id
column.description: Unique identifier for the specific variant/SKU (e.g., shade/pack) and an indexed filter key for performance. Use this for SKU-level joins/analysis when Product_Id is too coarse.

column.name: Zone
column.description: Geographic or sales zone classification (e.g., "South", "East-1", "Upper North"). Use for regional performance and distribution analysis; treat as a categorical grouping that may have naming variations (e.g., "East 2" vs "East-1").
